paragraphs.text: BE SILENT AS A LAMB, THAT OPENs NOT YOUR MOUTH, WHEN YOU DO NOT UNDERSTAND OUR DIVINE WRITINGS BECAUSE, AS FAR AS THE HEAVEN IS ABOVE THE EARTH, SO ARE OUR THOUGHTS ABOVE YOUR THOUGHTS; AND OUR WAYS ABOVE YOUR WAYS, AFFIRMS THE TRINITY IN STANDING NEXT TO ME NOW! "OTHERWISE, YOUR UNDERSTANDING WILL BE EVEN MORE DARKENED, AS A RESULT OF ABUNDANT REDUNDANT WORDS, SIN ABOUND EVEN MORE, WHICH WILL LEAD TO MORE UNDESIRED BACKLASH", I SAW THESE WORDS.
PROVERB 10:19 IN THE MULTITUDE H7230 OF WORDS H1697 THERE WANTETH H2308 NOT SIN H6588: BUT HE THAT REFRAINETH H2820 HIS LIPS H8193 IS WISE H7919.

HAVE YOUR MIND BE RENEWED WITH NEW WINE SKIN, TO ABSORD AKIN OUR LAST DAYS NEW WINE OF OUR PROPHETIC NEW LAST DAYS DOCTRINE(S) FOR THOSE WHO ARE OPEN TO THE OUTPOURING OF OUR SPIRIT IN THE LAST DAYS IN

JOEL2:28 AND IT SHALL COME TO PASS AFTERWARD, THAT I WILL POUR OUT MY SPIRIT UPON ALL FLESH; AND YOUR SONS AND YOUR DAUGHTERS SHALL PROPHESY, YOUR OLD MEN SHALL DREAM DREAMS, YOUR YOUNG MEN SHALL SEE VISIONS: JOEL2:29 AND ALSO UPON THE SERVANTS AND UPON THE HANDMAIDS IN THOSE DAYS WILL I POUR OUT MY SPIRIT.

HAVING YOUR MIND BEING RENOVATED BY THE HOLY SPIRIT FROM A FALLEN MAN'S CARNAL MIND AS A RESULT OF EATING FORBIDDEN FRUIT FROM THE FORBIDDEN TREE OF KNOWLEDGE OF GOOD AND EVIL, BY UPROOTING THIS CURSED TREE FROM EVERY MANKIND ON EARTH, AND REPLANT THE BRANCH FROM THE TREE OF LIFE, THE MIND OF A CHRIST,

WHICH IS THE MIND OF THE CREATOR, LIKE YOUR FATHER IN HEAVEN WHO CREATED YOUR SPIRITMAN SENT YOU TO THE EARTH TO BE PERFECTED TO BEAR CHRISTLIKENESS IN CHARACTER, LIKE SONS WHO ARE CALLED TO IMITATE AFTER JESUS'S FOOTSTEPS!
TITUS 3:5 NOT BY WORKS OF RIGHTEOUSNESS WHICH WE HAVE DONE, BUT ACCORDING TO HIS MERCY HE SAVED US, BY THE WASHING OF REGENERATION AND RENEWING G342 (RENOVATION) OF THE HOLY GHOST.
